uses_batch_processing.title: Uses Batch Processing
uses_batch_processing.description: Whether chunked batch analysis was used.

appendix.title: Appendix
appendix.description: Optional extra evidence index or caveats.

title.title: Title
title.description: Chinese title for the dossier section.

multi_speaker.title: Multi Speaker
multi_speaker.description: Whether the sample appears to contain multiple speakers.

batch_mode.title: Batch Mode
batch_mode.description: Whether chunked batch analysis was used.

noise_handling.title: Noise Handling
noise_handling.description: How timestamps, labels, or noise markers were handled.

excerpt.title: Excerpt
excerpt.description: Verbatim evidence excerpt copied from the analyzed sample text.

location.title: Location
location.description: Timestamp, chapter, paragraph, or fallback location for the excerpt.

representative_evidence.title: Representative Evidence
representative_evidence.description: Representative excerpts that support the summary.

evidence_anchor.title: Evidence Anchor
evidence_anchor.description: How generation should stay anchored to evidence.

label.title: Label
label.description: Short label for this style feature.

is_weak_judgment.title: Is Weak Judgment
is_weak_judgment.description: True when the conclusion is evidence-limited or inferential.

style_name.title: Style Name
style_name.description: Editable display name for the style.

style_positioning.title: Style Positioning
style_positioning.description: Compact positioning statement for the style.

core_features.title: Core Features
core_features.description: Core style features backed by the analysis report.

lexical_preferences.title: Lexical Preferences
lexical_preferences.description: Preferred words, phrases, and lexical patterns.

rhythm_profile.title: Rhythm Profile
rhythm_profile.description: Sentence rhythm and paragraph cadence controls.

punctuation_profile.title: Punctuation Profile
punctuation_profile.description: Punctuation habits to preserve or avoid.

avoid_or_rare.title: Avoid Or Rare
avoid_or_rare.description: Patterns that are absent, rare, or should be avoided.

scene.title: Scene
scene.description: Scene category such as dialogue, action, or environment.

instruction.title: Instruction
instruction.description: Actionable generation instruction for the scene.
